Mixed martial arts events
2009 in Shooto
Information
First dateJanuary 18, 2009
Last dateDecember 23, 2009
Events
Total events30
Fights
Total fights224
Title fights5
Chronology
2008 in Shooto 2009 in Shooto 2010 in Shooto

The year 2009 is the 21st year in the history of Shooto, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Japan. In 2009 Shooto held 30 events beginning with, Shooto: Shooto Tradition 5.

Title fights

[edit]
Title fights in 2009
Weight class Method Round Time Event Notes
Flyweight Shinichi Kojima (c) def. Yuki Shojo Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 3 0:38 Shooto: Shooto Tradition 6 [a]
Bantamweight Masakatsu Ueda (c) def. So Tazawa Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Shooto Tradition 6 [b]
Featherweight Takeshi Inoue (c) def. Rumina Sato TKO (Punches) 1 4:41 Shooto: Shooto Tradition Final [c]
Bantamweight Masakatsu Ueda (c) def. Eduardo Dantas Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Revolutionary Exchanges 1: Undefeated [d]
Strawweight Rambaa Somdet def. Noboru Tahara Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Revolutionary Exchanges 3 [e]
  1. ^ For the Flyweight Championship.
  2. ^ For the Bantamweight Championship.
  3. ^ For the Featherweight Championship.
  4. ^ For the Bantamweight Championship.
  5. ^ For the Strawweight Championship.
